data.title: Write RED tests for REBASE_HEAD filtering in record-test-status.sh
data.description:
## Description

Add 2 test functions to tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-part2.sh (part2 has 8 sections, 4 slots remaining under the 12-section split-guard cap):

1. test_record_status_rebase_filters_incoming_only: Create git repo (mktemp -d, trap cleanup). Set up REBASE_HEAD state (.git/REBASE_HEAD + .git/rebase-merge/onto + .git/rebase-merge/orig-head — NOT .git/ORIG_HEAD). Stage an incoming-only file. Run record-test-status.sh with a test command. Verify it only records status for worktree-branch files.

2. test_record_status_rebase_failsafe: REBASE_HEAD present, no onto file. Verify fallback to normal behavior.

IMPORTANT: Write orig-head to .git/rebase-merge/orig-head, NOT .git/ORIG_HEAD.

PREREQUISITE: Story 6f45-a206 must be merged first (provides the REBASE_HEAD pattern to mirror).

## TDD Requirement
Tests FAIL (RED) — no REBASE_HEAD handling exists in record-test-status.sh.

## File Impact
- tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-part2.sh (modify)
- .test-index (modify — add RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] At least 2 new rebase test functions in part2
  Verify: grep -c "test_record_status_rebase" tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-part2.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker added
  Verify: grep -q 'record-test-status.*test_record_status_rebase' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
